programmes.show_description: (2019) Shola Amoo's semi-autobiographical coming-of-age drama follows a young boy's journey from idyllic Lincolnshire countryside to a London high-rise.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1962) Comedy. James Stewart's plan for a peaceful vacation with his wife Maureen O'Hara doesn't quite materialise when she hires a crumbling old house and invites the whole family along.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.

programmes.show_name: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programmes.show_description: (1957) David Lean's Oscar-winning fact-based Second World War classic stars Alec Guinness as the driven commander of a group of POWs building a rail bridge for the Japanese.
(1985) Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.
Tom Hanks and director Paul Greengrass talk about making the tense, real-life thriller Captain Phillips.
(2022) Sam Rockwell and Saoirse Ronan head a splendid ensemble for this comedy whodunnit that places a real murder among a production of Agatha Christie's The Mousetrap. With Adrien Brody.
(1992) High-stakes courtroom drama with more than a few good actors, including Jack Nicholson, Demi Moore and Tom Cruise. Can a lackadaisical naval lawyer crack a battle-hardened colonel?
(2021) Stephen Graham stars as a top chef spiralling inexorably towards destruction, as his life descends into chaos over one night's service at a fancy London restaurant.
(2021) Dark, tense thriller with Oscar Isaac and Tiffany Haddish. An ex-con-turned-professional-gambler is tempted to reject his strict routine and seek revenge for his military past.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
(1960) Adventure with Richard Greene, Peter Cushing and a young Oliver Reed. Can Robin Hood foil the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham's evil plan to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury?
(1989) Comedy-thriller starring Tom Hanks. A cop investigates a murder to which there's just one witness: Hooch, a slobbering, beer-drinking French mastiff, who now needs 24/7 protection.
(1957) Classic sci-fi horror about the perils of radiation. A normal-sized fella gets a lot, lot smaller when he breathes in a mysterious mist. Definitely not one for arachnophobes!

programmes.show_name: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programmes.show_description: (1959) Fantasy adventure starring James Mason, Pat Boone and Diane Baker. An expedition to the centre of the planet unexpectedly encounters a villainous rival and prehistoric beasts.
(2022) Poignant road-trip comedy with Channing Tatum. A soldier with PTSD must escort a traumatised army canine to a comrade's funeral. Can man and dog save each other's lives?
(2023) Sci-fi action adventure starring Adam Driver as a spaceman who crash-lands on a strange planet where giant lizards stalk the darkness... 65 million years ago.
(2020) Potential disaster-in-the-skies thriller with Allison Williams and Alexander Dreymon. A couple must fly their small plane to safety when the pilot dies. Easy, right?
